markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Chainlink and GrowthX for AI-driven content creation and SEO optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/fRhFpBVH2u3ew4GggGrEdjAamWdd2fHX?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end AI-powered content creation, SEO optimization, and publishing services](https://fathom.video/share/fRhFpBVH2u3ew4GggGrEdjAamWdd2fHX?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [Chainlink has a robust in-house AI content generation system but seeks solutions for third-party citations and technical documentation](https://fathom.video/share/fRhFpBVH2u3ew4GggGrEdjAamWdd2fHX?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)
  - [Potential areas for collaboration: API access to GrowthX's specialized workflows, exploring documentation generation for Chainlink's technical team](https://fathom.video/share/fRhFpBVH2u3ew4GggGrEdjAamWdd2fHX?tab=summary&timestamp=1949.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's AI-Driven Content Creation Platform

  - [Comprehensive platform combining AI workflows with expert human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/fRhFpBVH2u3ew4GggGrEdjAamWdd2fHX?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [Features include research compilation, content drafting, SEO optimization, and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/fRhFpBVH2u3ew4GggGrEdjAamWdd2fHX?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Utilizes various AI models and tools (e.g., XAI, Parallel, Perplexity, Deep Research)](https://fathom.video/share/fRhFpBVH2u3ew4GggGrEdjAamWdd2fHX?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Includes self-improving loops for content quality and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/fRhFpBVH2u3ew4GggGrEdjAamWdd2fHX?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)

### Chainlink's Current Content Strategy

  - [In-house AI content generation system developed over 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/fRhFpBVH2u3ew4GggGrEdjAamWdd2fHX?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
  - [Using Scrunch for content performance measurement](https://fathom.video/share/fRhFpBVH2u3ew4GggGrEdjAamWdd2fHX?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)
  - [Struggling with third-party site citations (only 4-5% of content referenced from Chainlink's own site)](https://fathom.video/share/fRhFpBVH2u3ew4GggGrEdjAamWdd2fHX?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)

### AI in SEO and Content Discovery

  - [Shift in content strategy due to AI-powered search (e.g., longer, more comprehensive answers)](https://fathom.video/share/fRhFpBVH2u3ew4GggGrEdjAamWdd2fHX?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Importance of being a "trusted source" for AI to pull information from](https://fathom.video/share/fRhFpBVH2u3ew4GggGrEdjAamWdd2fHX?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Need for both quality and quantity in content production to increase "surface area" for AI discovery](https://fathom.video/share/fRhFpBVH2u3ew4GggGrEdjAamWdd2fHX?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)

### Technical Documentation Generation

  - [GrowthX has experience creating technical documentation (e.g., for Webflow, Strapi)](https://fathom.video/share/fRhFpBVH2u3ew4GggGrEdjAamWdd2fHX?tab=summary&timestamp=1736.0)
  - [Potential area for collaboration, as Chainlink has a small docs team supporting multiple products](https://fathom.video/share/fRhFpBVH2u3ew4GggGrEdjAamWdd2fHX?tab=summary&timestamp=1758.0)

### Business Model and Collaboration Possibilities

  - [GrowthX open to providing API access to their workflows](https://fathom.video/share/fRhFpBVH2u3ew4GggGrEdjAamWdd2fHX?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)
  - [Possibility of trial/demo for Chainlink to compare GrowthX's stack with their existing system](https://fathom.video/share/fRhFpBVH2u3ew4GggGrEdjAamWdd2fHX?tab=summary&timestamp=1961.0)
  - [Potential focus on documentation generation for Chainlink's technical team](https://fathom.video/share/fRhFpBVH2u3ew4GggGrEdjAamWdd2fHX?tab=summary&timestamp=1949.0)

### Additional AI Applications

  - [GrowthX's capabilities in AI-driven image generation for content enrichment](https://fathom.video/share/fRhFpBVH2u3ew4GggGrEdjAamWdd2fHX?tab=summary&timestamp=2022.0)
  - [Brief discussion on video generation (currently not a focus for GrowthX)](https://fathom.video/share/fRhFpBVH2u3ew4GggGrEdjAamWdd2fHX?tab=summary&timestamp=2105.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to explore providing API access to their specialized workflows for Chainlink to evaluate](https://fathom.video/share/fRhFpBVH2u3ew4GggGrEdjAamWdd2fHX?tab=summary&timestamp=1949.0)
  - [Chainlink to investigate GrowthX's capabilities in technical documentation generation](https://fathom.video/share/fRhFpBVH2u3ew4GggGrEdjAamWdd2fHX?tab=summary&timestamp=1949.0)
  - [Joshua (Chainlink) to test GrowthX's tool and compare it with their existing stack](https://fathom.video/share/fRhFpBVH2u3ew4GggGrEdjAamWdd2fHX?tab=summary&timestamp=1961.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting to be scheduled after GrowthX's Series B funding round for deeper technical discussions](https://fathom.video/share/fRhFpBVH2u3ew4GggGrEdjAamWdd2fHX?tab=summary&timestamp=1978.0)
